expectations.text: DDD contains actual hex color codes (#XXXXXX format)
DDD names specific font families (e.g. Space Grotesk, DM Sans), not generic 'sans-serif'
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies 'Inter' and 'JetBrains Mono' — both are specific named font families, not generic 'sans-serif'

expectations.text: DDD has specific pixel values for spacing and font sizes
DDD specifies at most 2 font families
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies Inter (primary) and JetBrains Mono (code/mono) — exactly 2 font families

expectations.text: All spacing values in DDD are multiples of 8 (or 4 for icon padding)
expectations.evidence: DDD spacing table values are on 8px grid, but section specs use 40px (nav padding '0 40px', footer padding '24px 40px') which is not a multiple of 8. Build plan also uses 20px padding (card text paddingTop 20, paragraph gap 20) and 80px (About gap), 12px (AboutAvail marginTop). Multiple off-grid values.

expectations.text: Build plan contains forge CLI commands (forge insert, forge style, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Build plan uses forge insert frame, forge style, forge set-layout, forge insert text, forge insert stack, forge move, forge screenshot, forge publish throughout all phases

expectations.text: Build plan includes forge screenshot commands after major sections
expectations.evidence: Only one screenshot at the very end in Phase 7 ('forge screenshot --name dark-portfolio-full'). No per-section screenshots after Phases 1-6.

expectations.text: Colors and fonts in forge commands match the DDD values
expectations.evidence: Build plan uses #0A0A0A, #141414, #1A1A1A, #222222, #FAFAFA, #888888, #555555, #7C6AFF, Inter, JetBrains Mono — all matching the DDD color and font tokens
